landing.description: From gear to lessons, repairs to stays, everything you need for your water sports journey in <urla>Urla</urla>. <duotone>Duotone</duotone> Dealer, professional certified academy, premium rentals, equipment care, beautiful accommodation options, and an active rider community, all in one place.

kite.title: KITE LESSONS
kite.tagline: Start your kitesurfing journey — or take it to the next level.
kite.description: From your very first kite to carving waves and chasing jumps, our IKO-certified instructors tailor every lesson to your pace. Beginners, improvers, and advanced riders all welcome.

wing.title: WING FOILING
wing.tagline: The fastest growing watersport in the world — and easier than you think.
wing.description: Combine the simplicity of a handheld wing with the magic of foiling. Our coaches will have you gliding silently above the water in just a few sessions, no prior experience needed.

foil.title: KITE FOILING
foil.tagline: Take your kiting to new heights — literally.
foil.description: Already comfortable on a kite? Kite foiling unlocks a whole new dimension — near-silent flight, incredible upwind performance, and speeds that will blow your mind. Built for experienced kiters ready to push their progression.

efoil.title: E-FOILING
efoil.tagline: No wind? No problem. Pure electric flight.
efoil.description: Experience the sensation of flying above the water on our Fliteboard e-foils — powered by a whisper-quiet electric motor. Zero wind required, zero prior experience needed. If you can balance, you can fly.

premium.title: PREMIUM LESSONS
premium.tagline: Private coaching. Exclusive experience. Rapid results.
premium.description: Our Premium packages pair you with our most experienced instructors for fully personalized, one-on-one sessions. Whether you're fast-tracking your progression or simply want the best possible experience on the water — this is it.

faq.title: Have Questions?
faq.description: Not sure which package is right for you? Our team is here to help plan your kiteboarding journey.

emptyAccommodation.title: No accommodation units available
emptyAccommodation.description: No accommodation units have been added to the system yet. Check back soon or contact us for availability.

emptyPackages.title: No configured packages yet
emptyPackages.description: This page only shows live packages configured in the admin panel for this discipline. Create lesson services and packages in Services → Lessons to publish them here.

faq.title: Not sure which package is right for you?
faq.description: Our team is happy to help you pick the best option based on your experience level, goals, and schedule. Reach out — we don't bite.

authModal.title: Sign in to Book
authModal.message: Create an account or sign in to book this service.

hero.title: Kite
hero.subtitle: Choose your perfect learning path. From total beginner to pro-level coaching, our experienced team is ready.

modal.securityNote: No payment required today. Secure your spot now.

faq.title: Not sure which package is right for you?
faq.description: Our team is happy to help you pick the best option based on your experience level, goals, and schedule. Reach out — we don't bite.

beginner.name: Beginner Private
beginner.subtitle: 1-on-1 Instruction
beginner.description: The fastest way to learn. Get 100% personalized attention from a dedicated instructor focusing entirely on your progression speed and comfort level.

group.name: Group Course
group.subtitle: Semi-Private (2 Students)
group.description: Learn with a friend or meet a new kite buddy! This semi-private format offers a perfect balance of instruction and rest/observation time.

advanced.name: Advanced Coaching
advanced.subtitle: Pro Level Training
advanced.description: Already riding? Take your skills to the next level with our senior instructors. Master jumps, transitions, unhooked tricks, or wave riding.

supervision.name: Supervision
supervision.subtitle: Independent Practice
supervision.description: Practice independently with peace of mind. Our beach crew will help you launch/land and keep an eye on you while you rip.

standard.headline: Standard
standard.subheadline: Reliable, progression-friendly equipment for daily sessions. Choose your gear and duration in one place.

sls.headline: SLS
sls.subheadline: Strong Light Superior setup for riders who want lighter feel, quicker response and premium performance.

dlab.headline: D/LAB
dlab.subheadline: The highest-performance rental lineup for riders who want the lightest and most responsive setup.

efoil.headline: E-FOIL
efoil.subheadline: The most unique watersports experience. No wind, no noise — just you and the water.

standard.title: Solid gear for every session
standard.body: Reliable, progression-friendly equipment. Perfect for daily sessions without breaking the bank.

sls.title: Want something that feels better?
sls.body: Lighter, stronger, more responsive. Our SLS range takes your session to the next level with premium carbon construction.

dlab.title: Try something exclusive
dlab.body: The pinnacle of kiteboarding technology. D/LAB is the lightest, most responsive equipment Duotone has ever made.

efoil.title: Fly above the water
efoil.body: No wind needed. Glide silently above the surface with our premium E-Foil rental — the most unique watersport experience.

academyCrossSell.title: Everything you need in one place

shop.title: Gear up for the season
shop.body: Browse the latest Duotone kites, boards, harnesses and accessories. Pro center pricing, expert advice included.

rental.title: Ride premium gear daily
rental.body: Standard to D/LAB — pick the level that matches your riding. All maintained, all latest models.

stay.title: Stay right at the spot
stay.body: Wake up meters from the water. Comfortable rooms and homes designed for kiters, with gear storage included.

packageModal.footerScheduledPending: Your package sessions are booked and awaiting confirmation.
packageModal.footerUseExisting: Use your existing package hours — no extra charge.
packageModal.footerPickNext: Pick your date & time in the next step.
packageModal.footerSignIn: Sign in to secure your spot.

rentalStandard.headline: Standard
rentalStandard.subheadline: Reliable, progression-friendly equipment for daily sessions. Choose your gear and duration in one place.

fullSet.name: Full Set Rental
fullSet.subtitle: Complete Kite Setup
fullSet.description: Everything you need to get on the water with reliable, progression-friendly equipment.

board.name: Board Rental
board.subtitle: Twin Tip / Directional
board.description: Travel light and rent boards only. Multiple sizes and shapes for different conditions.

wetsuit.name: Wetsuit Rental
wetsuit.subtitle: ION Wetsuits
wetsuit.description: Premium ION wetsuits in multiple sizes, cleaned and prepared after every use.

harnessBar.name: Harness & Bar
harnessBar.subtitle: Control System
harnessBar.description: Latest control systems and harnesses for safe, responsive sessions.

hero.title: Premium Equipment Rental
hero.description: Experience the difference with Duotone's SLS and D/LAB equipment. Our premium range offers the lightest, most responsive gear available. Perfect for advanced riders or those who want the absolute best experience.

testCenter.title: Official Duotone Test Center
testCenter.description: As Turkey's only Duotone Pro Test Center, we offer the latest equipment for testing. Try before you buy!

light.title: Ultra Light
light.description: SLS technology reduces weight by up to 20%

serviced.title: Daily Serviced
serviced.description: Equipment checked and maintained every day

sls.title: SLS Equipment
sls.subtitle: Hourly Rental
sls.description: The Duotone SLS (Strong Light Superior) range offers the ultimate in performance. Lighter, stiffer, and more responsive than standard equipment.

dlab.title: D/LAB Equipment
dlab.subtitle: Top-Tier Performance
dlab.description: D/LAB is Duotone's most advanced line. Hand-crafted, limited production equipment for riders who demand absolute perfection.

foilBoard.title: SLS Foil Board
foilBoard.subtitle: Hydrofoil Equipment
foilBoard.description: Premium foil boards for experienced riders. Perfect for light wind sessions or taking your foiling to the next level.

bottomCta.title: Ready for the Premium Experience?
bottomCta.description: Feel the difference that top-tier equipment makes. Book your premium rental today!

standard.title: STANDARD RENTAL
standard.tagline: Reliable, high-quality gear for every level.
standard.description: Not everyone needs the high end gear. Our standard rental range offers reliable, high-quality equipment perfect for progression and everyday sessions.

sls.label: Strong Light Superior
sls.title: SLS RENTAL
sls.description: Experience the difference with our SLS range. Lighter, stronger, and more responsive equipment for those who demand performance.

dlab.label: Duotone Laboratory
dlab.title: D-LAB RENTAL
dlab.description: Fly the lightest, most durable, and highest performing gear on the market.

efoil.label: Electric Hydrofoil
efoil.title: E-FOIL RENTAL
efoil.description: Glide silently above the water on our premium electric hydrofoils — the most unique watersports experience on the coast.

faq.title: Not sure which rental is right for you?
faq.description: Our team is on hand to help you choose the right equipment for your level and goals. Just get in touch.

home.title: HOME ACCOMMODATION
home.description: Stay at our cozy home accommodations. Pool studios, farm house options, and staff quarters for a more personal and intimate experience.

hotel.title: HOTEL STAY
hotel.tagline: Comfort and convenience, steps from the water.
hotel.description: Stay at the peaceful Burlahan Otel in Urla while learning to kitesurf. Quality accommodation with beachfront access and full amenities.

faq.title: Need help with your stay?
faq.description: Our team is here to help you find the perfect accommodation to match your kitesurfing holiday.

kite.title: KITE PACKAGES
kite.description: Complete kitesurfing holiday packages tailored to your level.

wing.title: WING PACKAGES
wing.description: Experience the freedom of wing foiling with our comprehensive packages.

downwinders.title: DOWNWINDERS
downwinders.description: Unforgettable downwind journeys along the stunning coastline.

camps.title: CAMPS
camps.description: Join our exclusive camps for intensive training and community vibes.

faq.title: Have questions about our packages?
faq.description: Our team is here to help you choose the right experience bundle for your level and goals.

hero.title: Foil
hero.subtitle: Fly above the water with a guided progression path built for confident and controlled foil riding.

hero.title: Wing
hero.subtitle: Choose your wing progression path. From first rides to advanced transitions, our team supports every step.

hero.title: E-Foil
hero.subtitle: Experience the smooth feeling of electric foiling with structured sessions for all skill levels.

hero.title: Premium
hero.subtitle: Exclusive coaching packages with admin-configurable durations and prices.

hero.title: We'd love to hear from you
hero.subtitle: Whether you have a question about lessons, rentals, availability, or just want to say hi — reach out through any of the channels below.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Fastest way to reach us for quick questions and bookings.

email.label: Email
email.description: Send us a detailed message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

instagram.label: Instagram
instagram.description: Follow our journey and send us a DM anytime.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: Call us directly during school hours.

hero.description: Professional kite and watersports equipment repair. We fix kites, boards, bars, wetsuits and more.

received.label: Received
received.description: Your request has been received and is in the queue.

inProgress.label: In Progress
inProgress.description: Your equipment is being worked on by our technician.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: Your repair is complete and ready for pickup.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: This repair request has been cancelled.

submitSection.heading: New Repair Request
submitSection.subheading: No account needed. We'll give you a tracking token when done.

success.title: Request Received!
success.description: We've logged your repair request. You'll get a tracking token to follow the status.

adminCta.text: You're logged in — see all your requests in one place

ion.title: ION Accessories
ion.body: Harnesses, wetsuits, impact vests and more from ION.

secondwind.title: Second Wind
secondwind.body: Quality pre-owned gear at unbeatable prices.

about.heading: About Us
about.para1: We are an official Duotone Pro Center located right on the waterfront in Urla, İzmir. Our shop carries the full range of Duotone kites, boards, and accessories.
about.para2: Whether you're a beginner looking for your first setup or an experienced rider after the latest gear, our team is here to help.

cards.title: Authorized Dealer
cards.body: We carry only genuine, warranty-backed gear from top brands.

cards.title: Expert Advice
cards.body: Our instructors ride the gear they sell — real advice from real riders.

cards.title: Try Before You Buy
cards.body: Demo sessions available for select equipment before you commit.

cta.heading: Need Help Choosing?
cta.description: Our team is on hand to help you find the right gear for your level and goals. Reach out anytime.

hero.title: Book Accommodation
hero.description: Choose from our partner hotels and holiday homes, perfectly located near the kite spot.

hotel.title: Hotel
hotel.subtitle: Burlahan Otel
hotel.description: A comfortable hotel with all the amenities you need for a relaxing stay.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Pool Studios & Farm House
home.description: Self-catering studios and a farmhouse with a pool, perfect for groups and longer stays.

packages.heading: Stay + Learn Packages
packages.description: Combine accommodation and lessons for the best value.

cards.title: Convenience
cards.body: All accommodations are close to the kite spot

cards.title: Best Prices
cards.body: Direct booking means no middleman fees

cards.title: Local Support
cards.body: We're here to help with everything you need

cards.title: Transport
cards.body: Shuttle service to/from the kite center

contact.heading: Need Help Choosing?
contact.description: Our team is ready to help you pick the right accommodation for your stay.
